title: DFN: Lapis Equipment
description: This Mod adds a Craftable Lapis Sword and Tools!
body:
## Lapis Tools

Put your lapis to work.

This mod adds a full set of lapis tools, giving you a simple and useful upgrade path using a resource that often goes unused. Lapis tools are slightly better than iron, making them a solid mid-game option without changing the core Minecraft feel.

### 🔷 What’s Included

* Lapis Sword
* Lapis Pickaxe
* Lapis Axe
* Lapis Shovel
* Lapis Hoe

### ⚙️ Key Traits

* **Balanced stats** – sits between iron and diamond
* **Reliable durability** - 350 Uses
* **Easy crafting** – uses lapis like a standard material
* **Higher Enchantability** - Lapis Tools have the highest Enchantability of all Tools

### 🎯 Design Philosophy

Lapis tools are designed to feel **natural and straightforward**.
No gimmicks—just a clean extension of vanilla progression.


### 🔧 Vanilla-Friendly

* Simple recipes
* No extra systems or mechanics
* Fits right into your world

**A small addition that makes lapis finally useful!**
